disclaimer_zh: 本区块汇聚实时动态，经 AI 翻译为中文摘要。AI 翻译可能存在偏差，关键判断请以蓝色「官方通报」为准。

updates.title_en: Health Department Adminsitrator addresses hantavirus concerns
updates.summary_zh: 卫生部门官员就汉坦病毒问题发表讲话。

updates.title_en: 2 Americans forced into quarantine following deadly cruise ship hantavirus outbreak - VPM
updates.body_en: 2 Americans forced into quarantine following deadly cruise ship hantavirus outbreak VPM
updates.summary_zh: 两名美国人因邮轮汉坦病毒疫情被强制隔离。

updates.title_en: N . Y . man who was on hantavirus cruise says Nebraska isolation feels like prison – NBC 6 South Florida
updates.summary_zh: 纽约男子称内布拉斯加隔离如监狱。

updates.title_en: WSU study finds high prevalence of hantavirus in some parts of Pacific Northwest - KXLY.com
updates.body_en: WSU study finds high prevalence of hantavirus in some parts of Pacific Northwest KXLY.com
updates.summary_zh: 华盛顿州立大学研究发现太平洋西北地区汉坦病毒高流行。

updates.title_en: Scientists to monitor British cruise passengers in hantavirus study - The Telegraph
updates.body_en: Scientists to monitor British cruise passengers in hantavirus study The Telegraph
updates.summary_zh: 英国科学家将监测邮轮乘客进行汉坦病毒研究。

updates.title_en: Ebola and hantavirus outbreaks highlight need for global pandemic preparedness, says virologist - University of Alberta
updates.body_en: Ebola and hantavirus outbreaks highlight need for global pandemic preparedness, says virologist University of Alberta
updates.summary_zh: 阿尔伯塔大学病毒学家称埃博拉和汉坦病毒凸显全球大流行防范需求。

updates.title_en: Study finds deadly hantavirus more widespread in Pacific Northwest rodents than expected - KOMO
updates.body_en: Study finds deadly hantavirus more widespread in Pacific Northwest rodents than expected KOMO
updates.summary_zh: 研究发现太平洋西北地区啮齿动物中汉坦病毒比预期更普遍。

updates.title_en: Man who was on hantavirus cruise ship says Nebraska isolation center feels like ‘prison' - NBC Los Angeles
updates.body_en: Man who was on hantavirus cruise ship says Nebraska isolation center feels like ‘prison' NBC Los Angeles
updates.summary_zh: 汉坦病毒邮轮乘客称内布拉斯加隔离中心像监狱。

updates.title_en: WHO Health Emergencies EPI-WIN webinar: Hantavirus in Focus II: hantavirus in an international maritime setting: natural history, infection control and clinical management of patients in hospital - World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.body_en: WHO Health Emergencies EPI-WIN webinar: Hantavirus in Focus II: hantavirus in an international maritime setting: natural history, infection control and clinical management of patients in hospital World Health Organization (WHO)
updates.summary_zh: WHO 举办汉坦病毒网络研讨会，聚焦国际海事环境中的自然史、感染控制与临床管理。

updates.title_en: EU accelerates research into hantavirus vaccines
updates.summary_zh: 欧盟加速汉坦病毒疫苗研究。

updates.title_en: Wet Weather in Argentina Helped Fuel the Cruise Ship Hantavirus Outbreak
updates.summary_zh: 阿根廷潮湿天气助长邮轮汉坦病毒疫情。

updates.title_en: EU boosts efforts on hantavirus vaccines
updates.summary_zh: 欧盟加大汉坦病毒疫苗研发力度。

updates.title_en: Molecular evolutionary analysis of the current MV Hondius Andes virus outbreak - Virological
updates.body_en: Molecular evolutionary analysis of the current MV Hondius Andes virus outbreak Virological
updates.summary_zh: 分子进化分析当前MV Hondius Andes病毒疫情。

updates.title_en: Saudi Arabia tightens checks for arrivals from Ebola - affected region ahead of Hajj
updates.summary_zh: 沙特加强朝觐前来自埃博拉疫区旅客检查。

updates.title_en: Ebola kills immunity that would attack it as 139 die | World | News
updates.summary_zh: 埃博拉病毒杀死攻击它的免疫系统，139人死亡。
